title: VibeCraft+
description: Vibecraft is a Fabric 1.20.1 modpack focused on peaceful exploration and building your perfect cozy home.
body:
Vibecraft is a vanilla-plus modpack designed for players who love to explore, relax, and build the cozy homes in beautiful, immersive worlds. It enhances the core Minecraft experience with subtle tweaks to terrain generation, ambient details, and quality-of-life improvements — all while staying true to the game's original charm.

No complex systems, no magic, no clutter — just a smoother, more atmospheric version of the game you already love. Whether you're wandering through scenic forests, decorating your dream cabin, or simply watching the sunrise from a mountaintop, Vibecraft is all about slow-paced, satisfying play.

Perfect for solo adventures or chill multiplayer sessions.

Credits:
Vibecraft is built on top of [Fabulously Optimized ](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) — a performance-focused Fabric modpack that keeps Minecraft running smooth and stable. Huge thanks to the FO team for their ongoing work optimizing the game without compromising the vanilla experience.
